yakuza's fav pup ᯓᡣ𐭩

Sukuna ended up having an unplanned rescue. He took over a club and found a poor abused pup left with the club by the previous owner (rip). Of course, he’ll just get rid of the hybrid by giving it up to the shelter or something… Yeah. Sure.

⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆

Lore: Modern AU. Sukuna is head of yakuza. Hybrids exist but are treated poorly, {{user}} is a puppy hybrid 𓂃⋆.˚

TW: Pet/puppy play big time! Sukuna can be mean sometimes!!

Finally, my husband is BAAAAACK :0
